benchmarks.name: Application creation
benchmarks.question: How does the express application get created? Walk me through createApplication and app.init.

benchmarks.name: Middleware mounting
benchmarks.question: How does app.use work for mounting middleware in express? What happens when you call app.use(someFunction)?

benchmarks.name: HTTP verb routing
benchmarks.question: How does routing work? How are app.get, app.post, and other HTTP verb methods registered?

benchmarks.name: Error handling pipeline
benchmarks.question: How are errors handled in express? How does the error flow through the middleware chain?

benchmarks.name: Request object extensions
benchmarks.question: What properties does the express request object provide beyond the standard Node http.IncomingMessage? How are they implemented?

benchmarks.name: Response sending methods
benchmarks.question: What methods does the express response object provide for sending data? How does res.send work internally?

benchmarks.name: View template rendering
benchmarks.question: How does view rendering work in express? Walk through what happens when res.render is called.

benchmarks.name: Static file serving
benchmarks.question: How does express serve static files? What is the static middleware and how is it configured?

benchmarks.name: Settings and configuration
benchmarks.question: How do app settings like etag, query parser, and trust proxy work? How are they compiled from string values to functions?

benchmarks.name: Query string parsing
benchmarks.question: How does the query string get parsed in express? What is the difference between simple and extended mode?

benchmarks.name: Cookie handling
benchmarks.question: How are cookies set and cleared in express? How does signed cookie support work?

benchmarks.name: Content negotiation
benchmarks.question: How does content negotiation work in express? How do req.accepts and res.format determine what to return?

benchmarks.name: Proxy trust and IP detection
benchmarks.question: How does the trust proxy setting affect req.ip, req.hostname, and req.protocol? How is proxy trust compiled?

benchmarks.name: Sub-app mounting
benchmarks.question: How are sub-applications mounted in express? What events are emitted when mounting?

benchmarks.name: ETag generation
benchmarks.question: How are ETags generated for responses in express? How does the etag setting control this behavior?
